relations.note: Both describe the same rounded, approachable shape language applied to different chart elements (container vs. bars/icons).

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Maintain a consistent, clean chart container appearance across the system.
rules.rule_text: Chart containers use uniform rounded corners (chart.container.radius = 12px) on a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel fill (chart.panel.fill) with a rounded Brand Blue (#00529b) header bar (chart.header_bar.fill), keeping charts clean, easy to scan, and consistent with the system.

effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points within charts
effect.subject: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) chart accent colors

quotes: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.

rules.intent: Keep chart color hierarchy clear so emphasis colors highlight key data without diluting brand color discipline.
rules.rule_text: Chart color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) are the dominant data colors; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are reserved strictly for emphasis on key figures/data points and must not be used as general chart colors. Placebo/comparator series use a neutral gray.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: rounded, approachable shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Apply the brand's rounded, approachable shape language to chart data elements and icons.
rules.rule_text: Chart bars and icons use rounded, approachable shapes, including rounded bar tops, to keep the chart visual language friendly and consistent with the system.

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Ensure chart headlines are immediately identifiable and consistent across print and email formats.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines are set in Agenda (print) or Nunito Sans ExtraBold (email), in ALL CAPS (chart.headline.case), Brand Blue (#00529b) (chart.headline.color), with a thin Gold (#ffc60a) rule beneath (chart.headline.rule_color).

quotes: Statistical callouts: large and bold (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.
Statistical callouts: large and bold (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.

rules.intent: Draw immediate attention to key statistics while keeping supporting context visually subordinate.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callouts in charts render the % figure large and bold as the visual hero (chart.statistical_callout.figure.weight = large and bold), with supporting copy set in a lighter weight beneath it (chart.statistical_callout.supporting_text.weight = lighter weight).

quotes: Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Prevent footnotes from being mistaken for primary chart data.
rules.rule_text: Chart footnotes are set noticeably smaller than body/data text (footnote.type) and must be clearly visually separated from the primary chart data to avoid confusion between footnote and dataset.
